allow: PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $conns.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction Stop; "stopped PID $_" } catch {} } } else { "no listener on 3000" })

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction Stop; "stopped PID $_" } catch {} } } else { "no listener" })
